# Promote non-voter to voter: r1 has 2 voters and 1 non-voter, but config says
# 3 voters. MMA should promote the non-voter to voter instead of adding a new
# replica on a fresh store.

set-store quiet=true
  store-id=1 node-id=1 locality-tiers=zone=a
  store-id=2 node-id=2 locality-tiers=zone=b
  store-id=3 node-id=3 locality-tiers=zone=c
  store-id=4 node-id=4 locality-tiers=zone=d
----

store-leaseholder-msg
store-id=1
  range-id=1
    store-id=1 type=VOTER_FULL leaseholder=true
    store-id=2 type=VOTER_FULL
    store-id=3 type=NON_VOTER
    config=num_replicas=3
----

# Under-replicated: has 2 voters but needs 3.
repair-needed
----
AddVoter: r1

# Repair promotes s3 (the non-voter) to voter.
repair store-id=1
----
applying replica change r1 type: ChangeReplica target store n3,s3 (replica-id=3 type=NON_VOTER)->(replica-id=unknown type=VOTER_FULL) to range 1 on store 3
addPendingRangeChange: change_id=1, range_id=1, change=r1 type: ChangeReplica target store n3,s3 (replica-id=3 type=NON_VOTER)->(replica-id=unknown type=VOTER_FULL)
result(success): AddVoter repair for r1, promoting non-voter on s3 to voter
pending(1)
change-id=1 store-id=3 node-id=3 range-id=1 load-delta=[cpu:0s/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B] start=0s gc=5m0s
  prev=(replica-id=3 type=NON_VOTER)
  next=(replica-id=unknown type=VOTER_FULL)

# Confirm the promotion: leaseholder reports 3 voters.
store-leaseholder-msg
store-id=1
  range-id=1
    store-id=1 type=VOTER_FULL leaseholder=true
    store-id=2 type=VOTER_FULL
    store-id=3 type=VOTER_FULL
    config=num_replicas=3
----

# After promotion enacted, range is healthy.
repair-needed
----
no ranges need repair
